name: expense-splitter-postman-automation
description: Newman automation pack for the Expense Splitter API

scripts.run:cli: ./node_modules/.bin/newman run "Postman/Expense Splitter - Automated E2E.postman_collection.json" -e "Postman/Expense Splitter - Local.postman_environment.json" --env-var "baseUrl=http://localhost:8080" --reporters cli
